name: Inventory Admin
description: Manage inventory records and schema. Actions: 'update' (change fields on a record), 'archive' (soft-delete), 'unarchive', 'delete' (permanent — confirm first), 'merge' (combine duplicates), 'list_columns' (show all columns on a table — use to check what exists before suggesting new ones), 'add_column' (add a new column to a table — ALWAYS confirm with user first). Tables: tools, saw_blades, wood, albums, manuals, router_bits. Use list_columns to check existing schema, then add_column when the user confirms a new field is needed.
author: Michael

action.description: Required. One of: update, archive, unarchive, delete, merge, add_column, list_columns.

table.description: Required. One of: tools, saw_blades, wood, albums, manuals, router_bits.

id.description: Required for update/archive/unarchive/delete. The integer ID of the record to act on.

fields.description: Required for update. Object of column names to new values. Only include fields you want to change.

merge_into_id.description: Required for merge. The ID of the record to keep (the 'winner').

column_name.description: Required for add_column. The name of the new column (lowercase, underscores, e.g. 'manufacturer' or 'motor_amps').

column_type.description: Required for add_column. One of: text, number, integer, decimal, boolean, date, timestamp. Default: text.
